title: dot-agents review decision
description: Canonical document for `.agents/active/verification/<task_id>/review-decision.yaml`. Written by `dot-agents workflow verify record --kind review` after phase decisions are supplied on the CLI. Consumed by `workflow checkpoint --log-to-iter --role review` when merging the review block.

schema_version.description: Increment when adding required fields or breaking semantics.

task_id.description: Plan task this review decision belongs to.

parent_plan_id.description: Canonical plan id (from the active delegation contract when available).

overall_decision.description: Consolidated decision. CLI derives pessimistic ordering: any reject → reject; else any escalate → escalate; else accept.

failed_gates.description: Verifier or gate slugs that failed (repeatable `--failed-gate` on the CLI). May be empty when overall is accept.

escalation_reason.description: Required when overall_decision is escalate; empty otherwise.

recorded_at.description: RFC3339 / RFC3339Nano timestamp when this decision was recorded.
